violations.text: Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (ice macine-shaved ice side) were observed with an accumulation of residue and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Unit taken out of service to be thoroughly cleaned and sanitized. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/04/2024

The following areas have an accumulation of soil residue and food debris. 1. Ledge (behind 3 bay sink) 2. Vents (on line cooking area) The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
The light shield in the prep area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 12/12/2023
